about.title: ABOUT ME
about.body: Full stack developer focused on the JavaScript and TypeScript ecosystem, building web and mobile applications with React, React Native and Node.js. I like turning real problems into simple, well-built and useful digital products.
about.filmsTitle: Some Movies I enjoy and recommend

experience.description: Engineering team that builds web and mobile tools for internal developers working with the company's lowcode platform. Responsible for creating and maintaining these solutions.
Same scope — building and maintaining web and mobile applications used by in-house developers on the lowcode platform.
Built features for apps and websites using React, React Native, TypeScript, Redux Toolkit and third-party integrations.
Technical support, SQL Server and business-rule assistance for a payroll management system.

projects.title: PROJECTS
projects.subtitle: A collection of projects I've worked on

descriptions.cowork: Complete coworking management system, including room and desk reservations, subscription plans, and an intuitive dashboard, built with Laravel and React.
descriptions.devlearn: DevLearn front-end: a modern web interface built with Next.js and TailwindCSS, consuming the DevLearn API for courses, videos, and learning progress.
descriptions.twii: Front-end of a Twitter-inspired social network, built with Next.js 15, React 19, and TailwindCSS 4. Modern design, dark mode, and fluid animations with Framer Motion.
descriptions.mtg: React Native app (Expo + Bare Workflow) for Magic: The Gathering players to conveniently track life points during their games.
descriptions.weather: React Native weather forecast app that displays current conditions and daily or weekly forecasts, using the user's location for accurate data.
descriptions.videoview: React Native app for short vertical videos using the Pexels API, with infinite scroll, autoplay for the current video, and automatic pause for others.
descriptions.urlshortener: Modern URL shortening service with click tracking, expiration dates, and QR Code generation.
descriptions.countdown: Simple React Native app for creating animated timers, built to practice animations using the Animated hook and dynamic time concepts.
descriptions.igniteshop: Rocketseat Ignite Marathon project for practicing Next.js and Stripe integration, creating a fully interactive online store.
